commands.summary: Production build completed without a database connection

notes: Diagnostic checks are one-shot and do not poll or mutate the filesystem.
Authorized legacy writes return 409 SETTING_READ_ONLY only after settings.manage.any authorization; unauthorized callers remain denied with 403.
Existing private storage, traversal, upload MIME/size, malware scanning, and readiness contracts remain green.
No local database was installed, migrated, seeded, or contacted.
